title: Oru Kochu Swapnam
overview: Sindhu  is a spoilt teenage girl living with her sister Sulochana and her brother-in-law Venu. She then moves into a hostel where her roommate is Sofia who is in a relationship with a music store owner who is of questionable character. Sindhu becomes intrigued by her sexual desires and falls for Sofia's boyfriend.
